overview: A WhatsApp-inspired self-messaging app where you can send notes and reminders to yourself, save reusable message templates, and browse your full message history in a chat-style inbox — all stored persistently on the Internet Computer.
features: Send messages to yourself with a chat-style compose area
Custom message templates library — create, edit, and delete reusable presets
Chronological chat-like message inbox with timestamps
WhatsApp-inspired green/teal UI with chat bubbles and responsive layout
